| [0001](./0001/) | core | draft | minor | not-started | 2026-05-25 — D25 locked — `#Catalog` uses `M=metadata` field-label alias (supersedes D19's `_md: metadata` hidden-mirror choice). Schema-enforced stamping guarantee (D19) unchanged; only the specific scoping mechanism switches. Rationale: more compact (no extra `_md` field on `#Catalog`'s value surface), scoping bridge stays inline with the metadata field. Both forms are structurally sound (experiment 09 validated); preference is stylistic — inline locality over named-sibling discoverability. Touches: schemas/target.cue (#Catalog definition + comment), 02-design.md Schema/API Surface snippet, 05-risks.md mirror-pattern bullet, experiment 09 README (Pins line + Implications section locked to label-alias). Experiments 10 and 11 retain mirror form in their copied schemas per skill rule 'copy, never reference; experiments are frozen-in-time demonstrations' — the mechanism choice is orthogonal to what those experiments validate (asymmetry and cross-catalog import). When 0001's core/ slice lands, `core/catalog.cue` uses the label-alias form. task vet:one + task check clean. | #Platform Redesign Umbrella |

## Status legend

- **draft** — initial design, actively being written
- **accepted** — design agreed upon, ready for implementation
- **implemented** — design has been realized in code
- **superseded** — replaced by a newer enhancement (see `superseded_by` in the entry's config.yaml)
